description: Manage GoDaddy domains and DNS records: list domains, view/edit DNS, and check account status.

safeTools.name: GetAccountStatus
safeTools.description: Check GoDaddy API connection status and domain count.

safeTools.name: ListDomains
safeTools.description: List all domains in the GoDaddy account.

safeTools.name: GetDomain
safeTools.description: Get details for a specific domain.

safeTools.name: ListDnsRecords
safeTools.description: List all DNS records for a domain.

safeTools.name: GetDnsRecords
safeTools.description: Get specific DNS records by type and name.

safeTools.name: ListNameServers
safeTools.description: List name servers for a domain.

safeTools.name: CheckTransferStatus
safeTools.infinitivePhrase: to check a godaddy domain transfer status
safeTools.description: Check the status of a domain transfer in progress.

safeTools.name: GetTransferAgreements
safeTools.description: Fetch the legal agreements required by GoDaddy for a domain transfer-in.

highRiskTools.name: AddDnsRecord
highRiskTools.infinitivePhrase: to add a godaddy dns record
highRiskTools.description: Add a DNS record to a domain. Requires confirmation.

highRiskTools.name: SetDnsRecord
highRiskTools.infinitivePhrase: to set a godaddy dns record
highRiskTools.description: Replace DNS records of a given type/name. Requires confirmation.

highRiskTools.name: DeleteDnsRecord
highRiskTools.infinitivePhrase: to delete a godaddy dns record

highRiskTools.name: SetNameServers
highRiskTools.description: Replace all name servers for a domain. Requires confirmation.

highRiskTools.name: InitiateTransfer
highRiskTools.infinitivePhrase: to initiate a godaddy domain transfer
highRiskTools.description: Initiate a domain transfer in with an EPP auth code. Requires confirmation and valid agreement keys.
